headline: Lean Manufacturing
description: Lean manufacturing (Toyota Production System, 1950s) maximizes value while minimizing waste. 5 principles: define value, map value stream, create flow, establish pull, pursue perfection. 7 wastes (muda): overproduction, waiting, transport, over-processing, inventory, motion, defects. Applicable beyond manufacturing.

citation.name: The Machine That Changed the World (Womack, Jones, Roos)
The Toyota Way: 14 Management Principles (2nd Edition, 2025)
citation.author: Liker J.K.

citation.name: Lean Thinking: Banish Waste and Create Wealth (2025 Updated)
